items.title_en: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
items.title_zh: 臭名昭著的贩毒集团头目伊斯梅尔·赞巴达在美国监狱被判处终身监禁
items.desc_en: Known as "El Mayo", the co-founder the Sinaloa Cartel was also ordered to pay $15bn after he admitted to sending vast amounts of drugs to the US.
items.desc_zh: 被称为“El Mayo”的锡那罗亚贩毒集团联合创始人在承认向美国运送大量毒品后也被勒令支付 150 亿美元。

items.title_en: Trump says Netanyahu won't be arrested in New York, pushing back on Mamdani

items.desc_en: Israel's prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, is the target of an arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Criminal Court related to the war on Gaza.
items.desc_zh: 以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡是国际刑事法院针对加沙战争发出的逮捕令的目标。

items.desc_en: Archer and its eVTOL peers are racing for FAA certification to start flying their air taxis commercially.

items.title_en: Newcastle, Liverpool and England legend Keegan dies
items.title_zh: 纽卡斯尔、利物浦和英格兰传奇人物基冈去世
items.desc_en: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan dies at the age of 75, seven weeks after he revealed he had been diagnosed with stage four cancer.
items.desc_zh: 前英格兰队队长兼主教练凯文·基冈在透露自己被诊断出患有第四期癌症七周后去世，享年 75 岁。

items.title_en: Alphabet stock pops on report it's developing a more efficient AI chip
items.title_zh: Alphabet 股票因正在开发更高效的人工智能芯片而上涨
items.desc_en: The new AI chip, called "Frozen v2," would embed parts of Gemini's architecture directly into the silicon, according to the report.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，这款名为“Frozen v2”的新型人工智能芯片将把 Gemini 架构的部分内容直接嵌入芯片中。

items.title_en: S&P 500 and Nasdaq are higher to start the week as U.S. oil wavers, chipmakers rise: Live updates
items.title_zh: 由于美国石油波动、芯片制造商上涨，标普 500 指数和纳斯达克指数本周开盘走高：实时更新
items.desc_en: Stocks rose Monday as oil prices fluctuated in response to the latest bout of military exchanges between the U.S. and Iran.
items.desc_zh: 由于油价因美国和伊朗之间最新一轮军事交锋而波动，股市周一上涨。

items.title_en: JetBlue wins Spirit slots at LaGuardia Airport, eyes move to Marine Air Terminal as airlines fight for space
items.title_zh: 捷蓝航空赢得精神航空在拉瓜迪亚机场的航班时刻，随着航空公司争夺空间，目光转向海军陆战队航空站
items.desc_en: JetBlue Airways won takeoff and landing slots for up to 12 roundtrip flights at LaGuardia Airport.
items.desc_zh: 捷蓝航空赢得了拉瓜迪亚机场多达 12 个往返航班的起降时刻。

items.title_zh: 俄罗斯加强对黑海商船的袭击造成十人死亡
items.desc_en: Russian strikes on the Odesa region have killed 28 people in July alone, local authorities say.
items.desc_zh: 地方当局称，仅 7 月份，俄罗斯对敖德萨地区的袭击就造成 28 人死亡。

items.title_en: AMD launches Helios, its first rack AI system to rival Nvidia, adding Microsoft as newest buyer
items.title_zh: AMD 推出 Helios，这是首款与 Nvidia 竞争的机架式 AI 系统，微软成为最新买家
items.desc_en: AMD is taking aim at Nvidia with Helios, its first AI rack system, and has landed Microsoft as a new customer, joining Meta, OpenAI and Oracle.
items.desc_zh: AMD 正在通过其首款 AI 机架系统 Helios 瞄准 Nvidia，并已将微软纳入 Meta、OpenAI 和 Oracle 的行列，成为新客户。

items.title_zh: 哈马斯任命哈利勒·哈亚为新任总领导人
items.desc_en: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.
items.desc_zh: 巴勒斯坦武装组织驻卡塔尔的首席谈判代表接替了 2024 年在加沙被以色列军队杀害的叶海亚·辛瓦尔 (Yahya Sinwar)。

items.desc_zh: 丈夫、妻子和他们的三个儿子都去世了，这意味着只有一个没有参加郊游的女儿还活着。

items.title_en: Voters wary of government ownership in companies as Trump administration takes equity stakes
items.title_zh: 由于特朗普政府持有股权，选民对政府对公司的所有权持谨慎态度

items.desc_zh: CNBC 的一项新民意调查发现，大约一半的选民认为美国政府持有公司股份是不合适的。

items.title_zh: 有史以来规模最大、最激烈的世界杯即将落下帷幕，FIFA 成为 90 亿美元的赢家
items.desc_en: The football governing body presided over the most lucrative sporting event in history and is poised to net over $9 billion in revenue for 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该足球管理机构主办了历史上最赚钱的体育赛事，预计到 2026 年净收入将超过 90 亿美元。

items.title_en: Russian President Putin meets with North Korean foreign minister in latest high-level diplomacy - AP News
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯总统普京在最新的高层外交中会见朝鲜外长 - 美联社新闻
items.desc_en: Russian President Putin meets with North Korean foreign minister in latest high-level diplomacy  AP NewsRussia's Putin meets North Korea's top diplomat in Kremlin  ReutersPutin thanks North Korea for
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯总统普京在最新的高层外交中会见朝鲜外长 美联社新闻俄罗斯普京在克里姆林宫会见朝鲜最高外交官 路透普京感谢朝鲜

items.title_en: Food delivery rider wins China's top literary prize
items.title_zh: 送餐骑手荣获中国最高文学奖
items.desc_en: Wang Jibing is among blue-collar Chinese workers gaining wider attention for their literary works.
items.desc_zh: 王吉兵是中国蓝领工人之一，因其文学作品而受到更广泛的关注。

items.title_en: Norway opens new memorial for victims of 2011 Breivik massacre
items.title_zh: 挪威为 2011 年布雷维克大屠杀受害者开设新纪念碑
items.desc_en: The artwork in the capital Oslo was unveiled on Sunday ahead of the 15th anniversary of the attack.
items.desc_zh: 这件艺术品于周日在袭击 15 周年纪念日之前在首都奥斯陆揭幕。

items.title_en: World Cup 2026 final in photos: Spain triumphs as football crowns a new champion
items.title_zh: 2026 年世界杯决赛照片：西班牙获胜，足球加冕新冠军
items.desc_en: Spain reclaimed football's biggest prize on Sunday, defeating Argentina 1-0 after extra time in a tense World Cup final.
items.desc_zh: 周日，西班牙队在紧张的世界杯决赛中通过加时赛以 1-0 击败阿根廷队，夺回了足球界的最高奖项。

items.desc_zh: 乔治敦和凯图马港之间的船只倾覆后，迄今为止已有八名乘客获救。

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克的火箭公司自一个月前上市以来，其股票交易一直波动较大。

items.desc_zh: 政府表示这将改善青少年的生活，但活动人士称这是“错失的机会”。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。
